calendar.matters:
Petition To Find Assets Are Property Of Trust
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Find Assets Are Property Of Trust
Off Calendar Apr-12-2016 Continued To May-10-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden for and with (petitioner) Michael Modesti.

The Court stated that there is no information as to when the assets were acquired and if they existed prior to the general assignment and that it needs evidentiary support. Ms. McFadden stated that the general assignment was submitted. The Court stated that it creates exceptions to assets acquired subsequently, that it needs evidence that they existed at the time of the general assignment. Ms. McFadden stated that the general assignment stated that everything not passed on by beneficiary designation is in the trusts. The Court stated that it needs something that shows that there were no beneficiary designations and that it needs a legal brief looking at the effectiveness of the assignment. Ms. McFadden stated that most of the assets had been acquired at the time the general assignment was executed. The petition to find assets are property of the trust was continued to May 10, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
